data.title: Swedish manufacturing industry faces tough times with decreased orders and revenues, under pressure from weak demand and trade tariffs.
data.description: Manufacturing companies in Sweden are experiencing a more challenging autumn than initially anticipated. Both order intake and revenues have been adjusted downwards, with margins being squeezed due to persistent weak demand. Additionally, the imposition of trade tariffs has emerged as a growing concern for these companies. Despite a less favorable outlook for 2025, companies are striving to adapt to these challenges.

data.title: Zinzino group revenue up 48% in Q3 2025, SEK 273.5 million in September sales markets. Faun Pharma's external sales dropped.
data.description: Zinzino group reported a significant 48% increase in revenue for the third quarter compared to the previous year. Based in Gothenburg, Sweden, the company saw a remarkable 53% growth in revenue for its sales markets in September 2025, reaching SEK 273.5 million, up from SEK 178.7 million. In contrast, Faun Pharma experienced a decline in external sales during the same period.

data.title: Dupoin reports global growth with user base expansion and regulatory coverage with positive user experience insights.
data.description: In Mutsamudu, Comoros, on October 3, 2025, the global trading platform Dupoin has disclosed updates regarding its international operations. The platform highlighted continuous user expansion, wider regulatory coverage, enhancements in infrastructure, and diverse positive feedback from clients. They reported an increasing number of users joining the platform, extending regulatory reach, improving infrastructure, and receiving favorable client reviews.

data.title: AB Volvo to release Q3 report on Oct 17, 2025 at 7:20am CEST. Press conference in Stockholm at 9:00am CEST.
data.description: In Gothenburg, Sweden, the Volvo Group will release its third-quarter report on October 17, 2025, 7:20 a.m. CEST. A press conference is scheduled at Tändstickspalatset, Västra Trädgårdsgatan 15 in Stockholm at 9:00 a.m. CEST. The report will provide insights into the company's performance and financial status.
